nodes.jobs:
job: definitions
  Checkout
  validate branch and environment
  get github token
  Azure login
  custom definitions
  setDefinitions - diagnostic settings
job: assignments
  Checkout
  Azure login
  get github token
  policy assignments
  wait while policy data propagates to graph
  generate Azure policy reference JSON
  push JSON to repo
  create PR if main
nodes.label: Azure policy

nodes.jobs:
job: hierarchy
  Checkout
  validate branch and environment
  get github token
  Azure login
  management group hierarchy
nodes.label: management groups

nodes.jobs:
job: accessControl
  Checkout
  validate branch and environment
  get github token
  Azure login
  access control at management group level
nodes.label: access control

nodes.jobs:
job: create-landingzone
  checkout local
  get github token
  Convert .bicepparam to JSON
  fetch JSON values
  fetch application repo variables
  echo landing zone variables
  Azure login
  Bring Your Own Subscription - rename
  Bring Your Own Subscription - change invoice section
  create subscription
  move subscription to management group
  create GitHub environment
  create landingzone
  Entra ID Roles (classic deployment)
  Github runners network configuration
nodes.label: landing zone template

nodes.inputs:
param accessControl = [
  {
    roleName: 'Platform Engineer'
    actions: [
      '*/read'
      'Microsoft.App/jobs/*/action'
      'Microsoft.Insights/actiongroups/*/action'
      'microsoft.policyinsights/remediations/write'
      'Microsoft.Insights/alertRules/*'
      'Microsoft.Resources/deployments/*'
      'Microsoft.Resources/deploymentStacks/*'
    ]
    principalId: azurePlatformEngineerGroupId
    scope: topLevelManagementGroupName
  }
  {
    roleName: 'Platform Owner'
    actions: [
      '*'
    ]
    principalId: azurePlatformOwnerGroupId
    scope: topLevelManagementGroupName
  }
]

nodes.jobs:
job: Config-GitHub-Variables
  Checkout
  validate branch and environment
  get github token
  create GitHub environment
  set environment variables
  GitHub organization databaseId
  github labels
nodes.label: GitHub variables

nodes.jobs:
job: Publish-Docker-Image
  get github token
  Checkout repository
  validate branch and environment
  login to ghcr.io
  Build Docker image
  Push Docker image
nodes.label: Docker images

nodes.jobs:
job: trigger
  Checkout repository
  get github token
  trigger workflows
nodes.label: trigger landing zones
